      <td class="col-field-name"><code>files</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>Array&lt;<a href="#pythonfilerecord">PythonFileRecord</a>&gt;</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Files are the installed files listed in the RECORD file for wheels or installed-files.txt for eggs.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>sitePackagesRootPath</code><svg class="required-icon"><use xlink:href="#icon-required"></use></svg></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">SitePackagesRootPath is the root directory path containing the package (e.g., "/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages").</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>topLevelPackages</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>Array&lt;str&gt;</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">TopLevelPackages are the top-level Python module names from top_level.txt file.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>directUrlOrigin</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code><a href="#pythondirecturlorigininfo">PythonDirectURLOriginInfo</a></code></td>
      <td class="col-description">DirectURLOrigin contains VCS or direct URL installation information from direct_url.json.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>requiresPython</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">RequiresPython specifies the Python version requirement (e.g., ">=3.6").</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>requiresDist</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>Array&lt;str&gt;</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">RequiresDist lists the package dependencies with version specifiers from Requires-Dist fields.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>providesExtra</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>Array&lt;str&gt;</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">ProvidesExtra lists optional feature names that can be installed via extras (e.g., "dev", "test").</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

#### `PythonDirectURLOriginInfo` {#pythondirecturlorigininfo}

<p>Represents installation source metadata from direct_url.json for packages installed from VCS or direct URLs.</p>

  <thead>

      <th class="col-field-name">Field Name</th>

    </tr>

    </tr>

      <td class="col-field-name"><code>commitId</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>

    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>vcs</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>

    </tr>

#### `PythonFileDigest` {#pythonfiledigest}

  <thead>

      <th class="col-field-name">Field Name</th>

      <td class="col-field-name"><code>value</code><svg class="required-icon"><use xlink:href="#icon-required"></use></svg></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Value is the hex-encoded hash digest value.</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

#### `PythonFileRecord` {#pythonfilerecord}

<p>Represents a single entry within a RECORD file for a python wheel or egg package</p>

<table class="schema-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th class="col-field-name">Field Name</th>

      <td class="col-field-name"><code>size</code></td>

### `PythonPdmLockEntry` {#pythonpdmlockentry}

<p>Represents a single package entry within a pdm.lock file.</p>

<table class="schema-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th class="col-field-name">Field Name</th>
      <th class="col-type">Type</th>
      <th class="col-description">Description</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>summary</code><svg class="required-icon"><use xlink:href="#icon-required"></use></svg></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Summary provides a description of the package</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>files</code><svg class="required-icon"><use xlink:href="#icon-required"></use></svg></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>Array&lt;<a href="#pythonpdmfileentry">PythonPdmFileEntry</a>&gt;</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Files are the package files with their paths and hash digests (for the base package without extras)</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>marker</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Marker is the "environment" --conditional expressions that determine whether a package should be installed based on the runtime environment</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>requiresPython</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">RequiresPython specifies the Python version requirement (e.g., ">=3.6").</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>dependencies</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>Array&lt;str&gt;</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Dependencies are the dependency specifications for the base package (without extras)</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>extras</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>Array&lt;<a href="#pythonpdmlockextravariant">PythonPdmLockExtraVariant</a>&gt;</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Extras contains variants for different extras combinations (PDM may have multiple entries per package)</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

### `PythonPipRequirementsEntry` {#pythonpiprequirementsentry}

<p>PythonRequirementsEntry represents a single entry within a [*-]requirements.txt file.</p>

<table class="schema-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th class="col-field-name">Field Name</th>
      <th class="col-type">Type</th>
      <th class="col-description">Description</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>name</code><svg class="required-icon"><use xlink:href="#icon-required"></use></svg></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Name is the package name from the requirements file.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>extras</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>Array&lt;str&gt;</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Extras are the optional features to install from the package (e.g., package[dev,test]).</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>versionConstraint</code><svg class="required-icon"><use xlink:href="#icon-required"></use></svg></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">VersionConstraint specifies version requirements (e.g., ">=1.0,<2.0").</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>url</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">URL is the direct download URL or VCS URL if specified instead of a PyPI package.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>markers</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Markers are environment marker expressions for conditional installation (e.g., "python_version >= '3.8'").</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

      <td class="col-field-name"><code>extras</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>Array&lt;str&gt;</code></td>

    </tr>
  </tbody>

### `RDescription` {#rdescription}

<p>Represents metadata from an R package DESCRIPTION file containing package information, dependencies, and author details.</p>

<table class="schema-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th class="col-field-name">Field Name</th>

      <td class="col-field-name"><code>title</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Title is short one-line package title</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>description</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Description is detailed package description</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>author</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Author is package author(s)</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>maintainer</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Maintainer is current package maintainer</td>
    </tr>

      <td class="col-field-name"><code>url</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>Array&lt;str&gt;</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">URL is the list of related URLs</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>repository</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Repository is CRAN or other repository name</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>built</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Built is R version and platform this was built with</td>
    </tr>

      <td class="col-field-name"><code>needsCompilation</code></td>

    </tr>

      <td class="col-field-name"><code>imports</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>Array&lt;str&gt;</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Imports are the packages imported in the NAMESPACE</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>depends</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>Array&lt;str&gt;</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Depends are the packages this package depends on</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>suggests</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>Array&lt;str&gt;</code></td>

    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

### `RpmArchive` {#rpmarchive}

<p>Represents package metadata extracted directly from a .rpm archive file, containing the same information as an RPM database entry.</p>

<table class="schema-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th class="col-field-name">Field Name</th>
      <th class="col-type">Type</th>
      <th class="col-description">Description</th>
    </tr>

      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>

    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>version</code><svg class="required-icon"><use xlink:href="#icon-required"></use></svg></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Version is the upstream version of the package.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>epoch</code><svg class="required-icon"><use xlink:href="#icon-required"></use></svg></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>int | null</code></td>
      <td class="col-description"></td>
    </tr>

### `RubyGemspec` {#rubygemspec}

      <th class="col-description">Description</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>name</code><svg class="required-icon"><use xlink:href="#icon-required"></use></svg></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Name is gem name as specified in the gemspec</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>version</code><svg class="required-icon"><use xlink:href="#icon-required"></use></svg></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Version is gem version as specified in the gemspec</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>files</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>Array&lt;str&gt;</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Files is logical list of files in the gem (NOT directly usable as filesystem paths. Example: bundler gem lists "lib/bundler/vendor/uri/lib/uri/ldap.rb" but actual path is "/usr/local/lib/ruby/3.2.0/bundler/vendor/uri/lib/uri/ldap.rb". Would need gem installation path, ruby version, and env vars like GEM_HOME to resolve actual paths.)</td>
    </tr>

      <td class="col-type"><code>Array&lt;str&gt;</code></td>

      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Homepage is project homepage URL</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Name is crate name as specified in Cargo.toml</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>version</code><svg class="required-icon"><use xlink:href="#icon-required"></use></svg></td>

    </tr>
  </tbody>

    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>homepage</code><svg class="required-icon"><use xlink:href="#icon-required"></use></svg></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Homepage is project homepage URL</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>dependencies</code><svg class="required-icon"><use xlink:href="#icon-required"></use></svg></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>Array&lt;str&gt;</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Dependencies are the list of required dependencies</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

### `TerraformLockProviderEntry` {#terraformlockproviderentry}

<p>Represents a single provider entry in a Terraform dependency lock file (.terraform.lock.hcl).</p>

<table class="schema-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th class="col-field-name">Field Name</th>
      <th class="col-type">Type</th>
      <th class="col-description">Description</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>url</code><svg class="required-icon"><use xlink:href="#icon-required"></use></svg></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">URL is the provider source address (e.g., "registry.terraform.io/hashicorp/aws").</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>constraints</code><svg class="required-icon"><use xlink:href="#icon-required"></use></svg></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Constraints specifies the version constraints for the provider (e.g., "~> 4.0").</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>version</code><svg class="required-icon"><use xlink:href="#icon-required"></use></svg></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Version is the locked provider version selected during terraform init.</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>hashes</code><svg class="required-icon"><use xlink:href="#icon-required"></use></svg></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>Array&lt;str&gt;</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Hashes are cryptographic checksums for the provider plugin archives across different platforms.</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

### `WordpressPluginEntry` {#wordpresspluginentry}

<p>Represents all metadata parsed from the wordpress plugin file</p>

<table class="schema-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th class="col-field-name">Field Name</th>
      <th class="col-type">Type</th>
      <th class="col-description">Description</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>pluginInstallDirectory</code><svg class="required-icon"><use xlink:href="#icon-required"></use></svg></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">PluginInstallDirectory is directory name where the plugin is installed</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>author</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">Author is plugin author name</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td class="col-field-name"><code>authorUri</code></td>
      <td class="col-type"><code>str</code></td>
      <td class="col-description">AuthorURI is author's website URL</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
